title: Los muertos no se tocan, nene
original_title: Los muertos no se tocan, nene
overview: Logroño, 1959. The death of a local authority creates a double expectation in his family, the coming of the TV set the deceased bought and the mayor to attend the funeral. His grandson (Airas Brispo) will witness the grotesque situations.

trailers.title: Silvia Marsó- LOS MUERTOS NO SE TOCAN, NENE de Jose Luis Gª Sanchez
